rulings.Case Title: SHENG-WEI LO ET AL VS. ROSALIA ELIAS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday July 7, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT ROSALIA ELIAS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR. Motion heard and DENIED on July 17, 2016. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that a motion for summary judgment may be re-filed, on the same grounds, after denial. = (501/REQ)
